reference: I just had surgery to remove stones from both of my kidneys and also had stents placed in both of them. I am urinating, but I feel like I am not going as much as I should. My abdomen is also extremely distended. I have been taking stool softeners three times daily. Is this normal and is there anything I can do to relieve the swelling?
text: I just had surgery to remove stones from both of my kidneys, and also had stents placed in both of my coronary arteries. But I feel like I am not going as much as I should. My abdomen is also extremely distended. I have been taking stool softeners three times daily. Is this normal? And is there anything I can do to relieve the slowing?
